issues.sample: At this moment I have two issues.  One being that the seat latch does not work on my scooter.  I called the dealer and he said to put a lot of push on top of the seat where the latch assembly is located.  I am a big fat slop.  225 lbs.  I pushed as hard as I could to lock it and
